geographic_restrictions: Greater Rochester/Finger Lakes region, New York State
project_area: Optics, Photonics, Imaging, and Laser (OPIL) technology, Defense and Space Manufacturing
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; emphasis on industry expertise and collaboration within the optics/photonics cluster.
eligibility_summary: Open to companies, research universities, workforce development programs, and economic development initiatives within the New York Photonics cluster (OPIL technologies). Focus on advanced manufacturing sectors, particularly defense and space.
